ExcelExpert.name: excel_expert
ExcelExpert.description: Workflow-first spreadsheet automation for xlsx/xlsm/csv/tsv deliverables, workbook-safe edits, formula-first modeling, pivot summaries, and template-preserving reporting.
ExcelExpert.trigger: Industrial data manipulation, template-preserving workbook edits, spreadsheet file delivery, and spreadsheet automation.
ExcelExpert.logic: Use when query involves spreadsheets, spreadsheet file paths, formulas, existing workbook templates, data tables, pivot analysis, charts, or numeric reporting.
example_inputs: Add a SUM formula to column D rows 2 through 50
Create a pivot table from Sheet1 grouped by Category
Format all headers in row 1 as bold with blue background
Generate a bar chart comparing Q1 vs Q2 sales

examples.reasoning: Preserving existing template while generating a summary pivot on a new sheet.

input_path.description: Optional path to an existing .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv spreadsheet to preserve and modify.

output_path.description: Required path to the output spreadsheet file (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv).

changes.description: Array of changes to apply (set_value, set_formula, format_range, create_pivottable, etc.)

officeContext.description: Optional context from Office host (activeSheet, selectedRange, etc.)

PPTExpert.name: ppt_expert
PPTExpert.description: Workflow-first PowerPoint automation for narrative slide design, grid-based layout planning, and brand-safe deck edits.
PPTExpert.trigger: Professional presentation creation and slide manipulation.

examples.reasoning: Creating a branded diamond shape using theme-aware color mapping.

changes.description: List of changes. Note: apply_layout is currently unsupported.

WordExpert.name: word_expert
WordExpert.description: Workflow-first Word automation for structured drafting, semantic editing, and brand-safe document changes.
WordExpert.trigger: Structured document creation and brand-consistent writing.

examples.reasoning: Drafting with terminology enforcement (glossary) and outline awareness.

changes.description: Array of semantic edits. Note: insert_ooxml is currently unsupported.
